Brain uploading is the process of replicating the data in a brain in an external object. Some say it causes [[Immortality]], but it is likely best used for replicating [[Servitors]] and minds for functional purposes rather than life extension.


It may beundesirable due to the significance of the body

[[Category:Medicine]]
[[Category:Immortality]]
[[sn:Brain uploading]][[Category:Psychology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
